changelog: Fixed 4 confirmed audit bugs: C-2 integrity-guard.js missing from admin.html, C-3 cert-v2.css relative path broken in print blob URL, S-2 manifest.json wide screenshot invalid aspect ratio, W-3 version.json date inconsistency. Previous: Verified and resolved 8 true bugs from audit report including Gemini API key deletion, dropdown XSS vulnerabilities, Service Worker CDN font fallbacks, sub-account lockout session resets, and bootstrap SyncEngine checks.
